title: ipomoea pes-caprae var. biloba
intro: Ipomoea pes-caprae var. biloba, also known as beach morning glory, is a type of flowering vine that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea pes-caprae var. biloba are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
